systemic_patterns: Internal tenant roles lack AppShell chrome (dynamic-forms-workflows, freelancer-marketplace)
Technical DSL/field-IDs leak to end-user UI (camelCase viewerRole, FLOW-NN prefixes, dotted event IDs)
Canvas/topology grammar (G4) does not adapt responsively below desktop viewport
Dev-infra error banners (provider keys) leak into admin production UI
